commit.message: Add back the previously deleted test cases

8382532: C2: VectorAPI: disable VectorMaskCmp-not optimization for predicated compares

JDK-8354242 added an optimization for VectorMaskCmp-not patterns.
That optimization was intended for unpredicated compares, but it also
matched predicated VectorMaskCmp nodes. Since the transform rebuilds the
compare node without preserving the predicate input, it can produce
wrong results for masked cases. For example:
`not( compare(a, b, EQ, pred) )` can't be converted to
`compare(a, b, NE)` if `pred` is not an all true mask.

Some predicated cases may still look safe, such as compares guarded by
an all-true mask, but C2 can introduce predicate inputs in several ways
and the current optimization does not handle them reliably. Instead of
trying to recognize a subset of safe predicated forms, disable this
optimization for all predicated VectorMaskCmp nodes.

The regression test coverage is updated accordingly: a dedicated test
keeps checking that masked compare-not is not optimized away, and
existing VectorMaskCompareNotTest cases are adjusted to avoid predicated
forms that no longer qualify for the optimization. The tests pass on
both aarch64 and x86_64.
